project: SemRec: Counterexample-Guided LLM Repair Oracle for C-to-Rust Translation
triage_critique: Scope limited to single functions with integer arithmetic excludes pointer arithmetic, structs, dynamic memory, and interprocedural dependencies pervasive in safety-critical C code.

top_improvements.title: Statistical Rigor: Bootstrap CIs, FP/FN Decomposition, K-Sensitivity, Stratified Reporting
top_improvements.rationale: Multiple reviewers (Yuan Cheng, Sara Roy, Aniruddha Sinha) flagged the lack of confidence intervals, FP/FN decomposition, and sensitivity analysis. These are low-hanging fruit that dramatically improve paper credibility without requiring new verification capabilities.
changes: Add bootstrap confidence interval computation to experiment runner
Decompose accuracy into false positive (false equivalence) vs false negative (false divergence) rates
Add K-sensitivity analysis varying unrolling bound from 8 to 128

top_improvements.title: Expand Verification Scope: Pointer Arithmetic, Struct, and Dynamic Memory Benchmarks
top_improvements.rationale: The memory model (memory_model.py) already supports pointers, structs, and heap reasoning, but benchmarks only exercise integer arithmetic. Adding benchmarks that exercise the existing memory model infrastructure validates the claimed capabilities.
changes: Add pointer arithmetic benchmark pairs to run_experiments.py
Add struct field access benchmark pairs
Extend oracle repair hints for pointer/struct divergences
Run experiments and collect real results

top_improvements.title: Real-World Validation with c2rust-Style Translation Patterns
top_improvements.rationale: All existing benchmarks are synthetic. Adding realistic C-to-Rust patterns that mimic common c2rust translation idioms addresses the benchmark construction bias critique.
changes: Add c2rust-style benchmark pairs with realistic translation patterns
Include common c2rust idioms: raw pointer casts, unsafe blocks, extern C patterns
Run experiments and report results honestly

math_rigor_items: Strengthen Theorem 1 (Soundness) with explicit encoding correctness conditions
Add bounded completeness lemma for K-unrolling with concrete characterization
Fix proof sketch for Property 1 to handle edge case of vacuous truth under UB
Add FP/FN rate bounds to evaluation claims
estimated_effort: Medium — leverages existing memory model and verification infrastructure
success_criteria: All benchmark pairs run through the real pipeline (no hardcoded results)
Statistical analysis produces bootstrap CIs on all reported metrics
FP/FN decomposition available for all verdict categories
Paper claims match actual experimental results
